zh.lifeSummary: 當Maredydd Ap Owain於大約0938年出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾丁萊 卡素時，他的父親Owain Ap Hywel Dda of Deheubarth29歲，母親Queen Angharad Ferch Llywelyn, Of Powys21歲。他與Nest Verch Owain在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他於986年被列為prince of deheubarth, powys, gwyned (galles)。他去世於0999年在他的家鄉享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maredydd Ap Owain于大约0938年出生在威尔士卡馬特史爾丁萊 卡素时，他的父亲Owain Ap Hywel Dda of Deheubarth29岁，母亲Queen Angharad Ferch Llywelyn, Of Powys21岁。他与Nest Verch Owain在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他于986年被列为prince of deheubarth, powys, gwyned (galles)。他去世于0999年在他的家乡享年62岁。

variants.name: O'Callaghan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Liam, Dermot, Donal, Kiernan, Niall, Conor, Donovan, John Patrick, Kieran, Siobhan, Tiernan.
Irish (Cork): from Gaelic Ó Ceallacháin, see Callahan .

nameMeanings.name: Maredydd
meanings: This is said to be the same name as Meriadek or Meiradwg, and also as the] Irish name O'Muireadwg, and the Scotch Mac Muireadaigh and Muir- eadhach. O'Reilly, however, renders the Irish word muireadach 'a sovereign, a lord j also a man's name, Morogh.' It means rather l admiral,' literally protector of the sea; from muir the sea, eadhach protector. I derive the British name from mawreddwg, mawreddig, magnificent, great, from mawr, great.

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Maredydd Ap Owain was born about 0938, in Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales, his father, Owain Ap Hywel Dda of Deheubarth, was 29 and his mother, Queen Angharad Ferch Llywelyn, Of Powys, was 21. He married Nest Verch Owain in Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. In 986, at the age of 49, his occupation is listed as prince of deheubarth, powys, gwyned (galles). He died in 0999, in his hometown, at the age of 62.

fr.Deheubarth: West Wales, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maredydd Ap Owain est né environ 0938, à Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Galles, son père, Owain Ap Hywel Dda of Deheubarth, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Queen Angharad Ferch Llywelyn, Of Powys, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Nest Verch Owain à Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. En 986, à l’âge de 49 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est prince of deheubarth, powys, gwyned (galles). Il est décédé en 0999, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maredydd Ap Owain um 0938 in Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Owain Ap Hywel Dda of Deheubarth 29 und seine Mutter Queen Angharad Ferch Llywelyn, Of Powys 21. Er hat in Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom Nest Verch Owain geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. 986, als er 49 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als prince of deheubarth, powys, gwyned (galles) aufgeführt. Er starb 0999 im Alter von 62 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maredydd Ap Owain è nato il circa 0938 nel Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Galles, il suo padre, Owain Ap Hywel Dda of Deheubarth, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Queen Angharad Ferch Llywelyn, Of Powys, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Nest Verch Owain nel Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Nel 986, all'età di 49 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come prince of deheubarth, powys, gwyned (galles). Morì nel 0999, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Maredydd Ap Owainが約0938年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアディンエフウル カストルで生まれた時，父Owain Ap Hywel Dda of Deheubarthは29歳，母Queen Angharad Ferch Llywelyn, Of Powysは21歳であった。イギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアでNest Verch Owainと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。986年，49歳の時，職業はprince of deheubarth, powys, gwyned (galles)と記録されている。彼は0999年に故郷で62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maredydd Ap Owain(이)가 대략 0938년 웨일스 카마테실르 딘프르 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Owain Ap Hywel Dda of Deheubarth(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Queen Angharad Ferch Llywelyn, Of Powys(은)는 21세였다. 그는 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르에서 Nest Verch Owain(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 986년, 49세의 나이로 그의 직업은 prince of deheubarth, powys, gwyned (galles)이었다. 그는 0999년 그의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maredydd Ap Owain nasceu aproximadamente 0938, em Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Gales, seu pai, Owain Ap Hywel Dda of Deheubarth, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Queen Angharad Ferch Llywelyn, Of Powys, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Nest Verch Owain em Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Em 986, com 49 anos, sua profissão aparece como prince of deheubarth, powys, gwyned (galles). Ele faleceu em 0999, em sua cidade natal, com 62 anos.

ro.Deheubarth: West Wales, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maredydd Ap Owain родился около 0938 г. в местности даинофр кастл, кармартеншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Owain Ap Hywel Dda of Deheubarth было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Queen Angharad Ferch Llywelyn, Of Powys, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Nest Verch Owain в местности монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. В 986 году, в возрасте 49 лет,  он работал по профессии prince of deheubarth, powys, gwyned (galles). Он умер в 0999 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maredydd Ap Owain nació aproximadamente 0938, en Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Gales, su papá, Owain Ap Hywel Dda of Deheubarth, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Queen Angharad Ferch Llywelyn, Of Powys, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Nest Verch Owain en Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. En 986, a la edad de 49 años, su ocupación registrada era prince of deheubarth, powys, gwyned (galles). Murió en 0999, en su pueblo, a la edad de 62 años.
